$description: Component manifest for e-conomic Web components design system

Button.description: Primary CTA component. Use for all clickable actions.

appearance.description: Visual style. default=grey bg, primary=blue bg, ghost=outlined, discrete=text-only, danger=red bg, transparent=no bg

fluid.description: If fluid, button expands to the width of its container

href.description: Provides url for buttons being used as a link

target.description: Provides target for buttons being used as a link

tooltip.description: A tooltip to show when hovering over the button

IconButton.description: Icon-only button for toolbar actions, close buttons, etc.

icon.description: Icon name from the TACO icon set (e.g., 'edit-simple', 'search', 'close', 'delete', 'settings', 'chevron-down', 'plus-minus', 'filter', 'export', 'print', 'refresh', 'ellipsis-horizontal', 'ellipsis-vertical', 'eye-on', 'eye-off', 'lock', 'lock-open', 'star', 'star-solid', 'attach', 'download', 'upload', 'copy', 'move', 'drag', 'undo', 'link-external', 'info', 'warning', 'calendar', 'person', 'envelope', 'phone', 'chat', 'bell-solid', 'house', 'list', 'document', 'tick', 'remove', 'arrow-up', 'arrow-down', 'arrow-left', 'arrow-right')

tooltip.description: Tooltip text to show on hover

aria-label.description: Accessible label since there is no visible text

Field.description: Text input field with label and optional helper text. The primary input component.

label.description: Field label displayed above the input

helperText.description: Helper or error text below the input

styling.layout: flex flex-col items-stretch (label, input, helperText stacked)

states.disabled: opacity: 0.5, cursor: not-allowed, label becomes font-weight 400

Textarea.description: Multi-line text input for longer content.

styling.layout: flex flex-col items-stretch (label, textarea, helperText stacked)

Combobox.description: Searchable dropdown select. Combines text input with a filterable list. MUST be interactive: focus/click opens dropdown, typing filters options in real-time, clicking an option fills the input and closes dropdown, clicking outside closes. Click the list button to show all items.

readOnly.description: Grey background, prevents editing and opening

modalButton.description: Controls visibility of the list-search icon button

Switch.description: Toggle switch for binary on/off settings.

label.description: Optional label displayed next to the switch

RadioGroup.description: Group of radio buttons for single-selection from multiple options. Uses custom styled 16px circular radio buttons.

Tag.description: Small colored label for categorization and status indication. Uses pastel backgrounds with dark text for readability.

icon.description: Optional icon to display before the label

onClose.description: If provided, shows a close (×) button

Tooltip.description: Contextual information popup that appears on hover. Dark background with arrow pointing to trigger. Two width modes: auto (shrink-wrap) or fixed 224px.

wide.description: When false (default), tooltip auto-sizes to fit text (no wrapping). When true, tooltip is fixed at 224px wide with text wrapping and left alignment.

children.description: The element that triggers the tooltip on hover

styling.arrow: 16px wide × 6px tall CSS triangle, same color as bg
styling.gap: 8px between arrow tip and trigger element

ListItem.description: Single item in a list. Can contain text, icons, and actions.

border.note: last item in group has border-bottom: none

ListGroup.description: Container for grouping ListItems with an optional header.

Table3.description: Full-featured interactive data table (Table3). Supports sortable columns, column filtering, column visibility (hide/show), freeze columns, row selection with checkboxes, row hover actions (edit, copy, delete), toolbar with primary action button, 'More' dropdown, filters panel, and search. Column headers show a 3-dot menu on hover with: Hide column, Sorting (Ascending/Descending/No sorting submenu), Freeze columns, Filter.

columns.description: Column definitions: { key, label, align ('left'|'right'), type ('text'|'number') }

data.description: Array of row objects keyed by column keys

sortable.description: Allow column sorting (click header or use column menu)

filterable.description: Show Filters button and filter panel

freezable.description: Allow freezing columns via column menu

subComponents.Table3.Toolbar: Container for toolbar actions (left: primary + more, right: filters + icons + search)
subComponents.Table3.Column: Column definition with sortable, filterable, freezable, hideable props
subComponents.Table3.ColumnMenu: 3-dot context menu on column header: Hide column, Sorting submenu (Asc/Desc/None with bullet indicator), Freeze first N columns, Unfreeze all, Filter
subComponents.Table3.FilterPanel: Floating filter builder: Where [column] [Contains|Equals|Starts with] [value], + Add new filter, Cancel/Clear/Apply buttons
subComponents.Table3.RowActions: Hover-visible action buttons on each row (edit, copy, delete icons in 32×32px buttons with 24×24px icons)
subComponents.Table3.RowExpansion: Expandable rows with chevron-right (collapsed) / chevron-down (expanded) in 32×32px button with 24×24px icon. Expand-all button in header uses chevron-down-double / chevron-up-double. Expanded row shows nested sub-table with white background.
subComponents.Table3.RowGroups: Grouped rows with sticky group header that stays at top during scroll until next group header replaces it. Scrollable container with max-height.
subComponents.Table3.RowSelection: Row selection with checkboxes, select-all in header. Selected row count displayed above table. Selected rows highlighted with bg-[#DEEBFF].
subComponents.Table3.Settings: Settings dropdown with Column settings panel (search + toggle visibility), Row height sub-menu (Short/Medium/Tall/Extra tall), Font size sub-menu (Small/Medium/Large).
subComponents.Table3.Editing: Edit mode toggle (pill switch), inline editing with text inputs and dropdowns. Has changes indicator, validation rules display, + New row button, Records count footer.

styling.headerRow: border-b-2 border-[#DDDDDD] text-xs leading-4 font-bold text-[#1C1C1C]
styling.sortIndicator: chevron-up-solid (ascending) or chevron-down-solid (descending) SVG icon, 24×24px, next to column label
styling.columnMenuTrigger: opacity-0 on rest, opacity-100 on header hover — vertical 3-dot icon
styling.rowActions: opacity-0 on rest, opacity-100 on row hover — edit/copy/delete icons in 32×32px buttons with 24×24px icons
styling.hiddenColBar: bg-[#FFF1C3] text-[#733700] with 'Show all columns' link
styling.tableContainer: border border-[#DDDDDD] rounded-[4px] overflow-x-auto — border wraps ONLY the table, toolbar and title sit outside

toolbar.primaryButton: bg-[#4573D2] text-white rounded-[4px] px-4 py-[6px] hover:bg-[#2B57B4]
toolbar.filtersButton: border border-[#DDDDDD] rounded-[4px] px-3 py-[6px] hover:bg-[#F6F6F6]
toolbar.iconButton: w-8 h-8 rounded-[4px] bg-[#EBEBEB] hover:bg-[#DDDDDD] with 24×24px icon inside
toolbar.search: border border-[#DDDDDD] rounded-[4px] pl-8 pr-12 py-[6px] w-[180px] focus:border-[#4573D2]

Calendar.description: Single-month date picker calendar. White card with elevation shadow, 7x40px grid of circular date cells. Separate month/year dropdown selectors with chevron-down, and prev/next chevron buttons. Two variants: with or without a Today button.

showToday.description: Show 'Today' link at the bottom of the calendar. When false, calendar omits the Today button.

onChange.description: Called with date string when user clicks a date cell

variants.withTodayButton: Calendar with a 'Today' text link centered below the date grid
variants.withoutTodayButton: Calendar without the Today link, just the grid and header

styling.container: inline-flex flex-col, white bg, rounded-[4px], shadow-[0px_1px_2px_rgba(0,0,0,0.3),0px_2px_6px_rgba(0,0,0,0.15)], p-[16px]
styling.dateCell: w-[40px] h-[40px] rounded-full (circle), text 14px/20px Regular, centered

dateStates.selected: no bg, text #4573D2 (blue text only, NOT blue background)
dateStates.disabled: opacity-50 (outside-month days, e.g. Oct 31 shown in November view)

styling.dayHeaders: MON-SUN, uppercase, Regular 12px/20px, text #595959, centered in 40px cells, pt-[8px]

periodHeader.monthLabel: Bold 12px/16px text #1C1C1C with chevron-down 24x24 icon, clickable to open month dropdown
periodHeader.yearLabel: Bold 12px/16px text #1C1C1C with chevron-down 24x24 icon, clickable to open year dropdown
periodHeader.prevNextButtons: p-[6px] rounded-[4px] hover:bg-[#EBEBEB], 20x20 chevron icons, gap-[4px]

styling.todayLink: text 12px/16px Regular, text #4573D2, hover text #75A0F5, centered, pt-[8px], cursor-pointer, bg-transparent border-none

DatePicker.description: Date input field with a calendar icon button that opens a Calendar dropdown. Combines text input with calendar for date selection.

label.description: Field label displayed above the input (Bold 12px/16px)

value.description: Current date value (ISO date string YYYY-MM-DD)

helperText.description: Helper or error text below the input

state.description: Normal=grey border, Highlighted=blue border, Error=red border, Disabled=50% opacity, ReadOnly=grey bg + disabled calendar button

onChange.description: Called with date string when user selects a date

styling.field: 160px wide, 32px tall, border #DDD, rounded-[4px], white bg
styling.calendarButton: 32×32px, bg #EBEBEB, 1px left divider #DDD, calendar icon, rounded right corners only
styling.dropdown: Calendar component positioned below the field

Pagination.description: Full pagination bar with left info group (page counter + page-size Select) and right navigation group (first/prev/page numbers/next/last). Adapts to page count with 7 right-group variants.

onPageChange.description: Called with page number when user navigates

onPageSizeChange.description: Called with new page size when user changes the page-size Select

showPageCounter.description: Show 'Showing X-Y of Z' text in the left group

pageSizeOptions.description: Options for the page-size Select dropdown

LeftGroup.description: Left side of the pagination bar. Contains optional page counter text ('Showing 1-10 of 100') and a page-size Select dropdown.

variants.selectOnly: Select dropdown only, no page counter text

RightGroup.description: Right side of the pagination bar. Navigation buttons: first, prev, page number buttons, next, last.

variants.5 pages: First + Prev + 5 page number buttons + Next + Last
variants.4 pages: First + Prev + 4 page number buttons + Next + Last
variants.3 pages: First + Prev + 3 page number buttons + Next + Last
variants.2 pages: First + Prev + 2 page number buttons + Next + Last
variants.1 page: First + Prev + 1 page number button + Next + Last
variants.only arrows: First + Prev + Next + Last (no page number buttons)
variants.text: Plain text showing total count, e.g. '190 item(s) in total'

styling.container: flex items-center justify-between (left group + right group)
styling.pageButton: w-[32px] h-[32px] rounded-[4px], text-[14px] leading-[20px], border-none
styling.arrowButton: w-[32px] h-[32px] rounded-[4px] bg-[#EBEBEB], 24x24 icon, hover:bg-[#DDDDDD]
styling.disabledButton: opacity-50 cursor-not-allowed (applied to first/prev when on page 1, next/last when on last page)
styling.leftGroupGap: gap-[16px] between page counter text and Select
styling.pageSizeSelect: h-[32px] px-[8px] border border-[#DDDDDD] rounded-[4px] bg-white, dropdown opens upward

Pagination.usage: <Pagination currentPage={1} totalPages={10} pageSize={10} showPageCounter onPageChange={fn} onPageSizeChange={fn} />

Form.description: Form container that provides consistent layout and spacing for form fields. Use with FormGrid and FormRow for multi-column layouts with vertical dividers.

children.description: Form content — typically FormGrid with column groups, or simple stacked fields

styling.layout: flex flex-col, gap 16px between direct children
styling.padding: 0 (add container padding at parent level if needed)
styling.submitBehavior: preventDefault() called automatically — use onSubmit prop

FormGrid.description: Multi-column form layout with vertical dividers between column groups. Each column group stretches equally (flex-1) and contains stacked FormRows. Supports 2 or 3 column groups (or more).

children.description: Column group elements. Vertical dividers are inserted automatically between each pair of groups.

variants.2 column groups: Two equal-width column groups separated by one vertical divider. Each group contains stacked FormRows with side-by-side fields.
variants.3 column groups: Three equal-width column groups separated by two vertical dividers. Demonstrates scalability for complex forms.

styling.columnGroup: flex-1 flex flex-col items-start min-w-0 gap-0
styling.divider: flex items-start self-stretch px-[16px] shrink-0 — contains a w-px h-full bg-[#DDDDDD] line (1px vertical line with 16px padding on each side)
styling.formRow: flex gap-[16px] items-start w-full — fields inside are flex-1 flex-col items-stretch
styling.fieldInput: h-[32px] w-full px-[8px] py-[6px] rounded-[4px] border border-[#DDDDDD] text-[14px] leading-[20px] bg-white, hover:border-[#ACACAC], focus:border-[#4573D2] focus:shadow-[0_0_0_1px_#4573D2]

FormRow.description: A row within a FormGrid column group, arranging fields side-by-side with 16px gap.

styling.children: each field defaults to flex: 1 so they split row width equally
styling.defaultWidth: 336px (2 × 160px fields + 16px gap) in Figma — stretches to fill parent
styling.verticalAlign: top-aligned so labels of equal height stay flush

ModeSwitch.description: Toggle between two modes/views (e.g., list vs grid, monthly vs yearly). A small pill-shaped switch track with left/right labels. Active side label is bold, inactive side is grey.

checked.description: When false the left label is active (bold), when true the right label is active (bold)

labelOff.description: Label for the off/left state (displayed left of the track)

labelOn.description: Label for the on/right state (displayed right of the track)

disabled.description: When disabled, entire row is opacity-50 and track shows cursor-not-allowed

onChange.description: Called with new checked state when user clicks the track

Select.description: Dropdown select for choosing one option from a predefined list. Click to open, no typing/filtering. Uses chevron icon. MUST be interactive: click trigger toggles dropdown, click option updates value and closes, click outside closes. Chevron rotates 180° when open.

SearchInput.description: Text input with a search icon button. Fires onSearch when the icon is clicked or Enter is pressed.

onChange.description: Called with the input value on each keystroke

onSearch.description: Called with the current value when search icon is clicked or Enter is pressed

Checkbox.description: Checkbox for selecting one or more options. Supports checked, unchecked, and indeterminate states.

indeterminate.description: Shows a horizontal dash instead of checkmark. Used for 'select all' when some items are selected.

onChange.description: Called with the new checked boolean

Tabs.description: Horizontal or vertical tab navigation. Organizes content into multiple sections with a 2px blue active indicator bar. Supports disabled tabs.

tabs.description: Array of { id, label, disabled? } objects

activeTab.description: ID of the currently active tab

divider.description: Show bottom divider (horizontal) or right border (vertical)

onChange.description: Called with the tab ID when a tab is clicked

horizontal.description: Tabs laid out in a row with bottom divider. Active indicator is a 2px blue bar at the bottom.
horizontal.tabStructure: flex flex-col items-center, rounded-tl-[4px] rounded-tr-[4px], overflow-clip
horizontal.activeIndicator: bg-[#4573D2] h-[2px] w-full rounded-tl-[2px] rounded-tr-[2px] at bottom of tab
horizontal.inactiveIndicator: same element with opacity-0 (hidden but reserves space)

vertical.description: Tabs stacked vertically with a right border divider. Active indicator is a 2px blue bar on the left.
vertical.activeIndicator: bg-[#4573D2] w-[2px] h-full rounded-tr-[2px] rounded-br-[2px] at left of tab

styling.tab: px-[16px] py-[8px], text 14px/20px Regular #1C1C1C, whitespace-nowrap, cursor-pointer
styling.activeIndicator: 2px bar, bg-[#4573D2], bottom (horizontal) or left (vertical), with 2px rounded corners on outer edges

Drawer.description: Side panel overlay for supplementary content. Three-part anatomy: Header (title row with action icons + close, optional tabs), scrollable Body, and Footer with right-aligned button group.

title.description: Drawer title displayed in the header (24px/32px Regular)

tabs.description: Optional tabs in header: Array of { id, label }. Rendered below the title row using horizontal Tabs component.

actions.description: Action icon buttons in the header (e.g., share, delete), placed left of the close button with a vertical divider separator

header.description: Top section with border-b. Contains title row and optional tabs row.
header.titleRow: flex items-start p-[16px] gap-[8px]. Left: title (flex-1, 24px/32px Regular #1C1C1C). Right: action icons + divider + close button.
header.actionIcons: p-[6px] rounded-[4px] hover:bg-[#EBEBEB], 20x20 icons in #595959 stroke
header.divider: w-px h-[20px] bg-[#DDDDDD] mx-0 between action icons and close button
header.closeButton: p-[6px] rounded-[4px] hover:bg-[#EBEBEB], 20x20 X icon in #595959 stroke
header.tabsRow: px-[16px], horizontal Tabs component with shadow divider

body.description: Scrollable middle section. flex-1 overflow-y-auto p-[16px].

footer.description: Bottom section with border-t. Contains right-aligned button group.
footer.buttons: Typically Cancel (default appearance) + Save (primary appearance), h-[32px] px-[12px]

styling.container: w-[420px], border-l border-[#DDDDDD], bg-white, flex flex-col, full height
styling.footer: bg-white border-t border-[#DDDDDD], p-[16px], flex gap-[8px] justify-end

AgreementSelector.description: Dark-themed dropdown panel for switching between company agreements. Contains search, agreement list with avatars, and action buttons.

groups.description: Array of { agreements: [{ id, companyName, agreementNumber, isAdmin?, avatarUrl? }] }

SideNavigation.description: Left sidebar navigation with 4 types: 'normal' (collapsible menu groups), 'inbox' (header + groups + panel), 'overview' (bold root items with chevron-right drill-in + bottom icon items), 'subpage' (back-chevron header + groups). Width is always 255px, bg #FAFAFA.

type.description: Navigation layout type. 'normal'=collapsible groups only, 'inbox'=header+groups+panel, 'overview'=root bold items with drill-in, 'subpage'=back header+groups

titleBadge.description: Badge count next to the inbox title

groups.description: For normal/inbox/subpage types. Array of { id, label, badge?, items: [{ id, label, dot?: 'dot'|'bin', dotColor?, badge?, active? }], expanded? }

items.description: For overview type. Array of { id, label, icon?, chevron?, active? }. Bold text, optional left icon + right chevron for drill-in

bottomItems.description: For overview type. Items shown in bottom panel section (Inbox, Settings, Log off, etc.) with icons

onBack.description: Callback for subpage type back button

panelContent.description: Bottom panel content (for inbox type: 'Add documents' button + email links)

MenuHeader.description: Bold 14px group header. Two variants: with chevron (collapsible group toggle, rotates -90° when collapsed) or without chevron (standalone label like 'Inbox'). Optional badge (grey pill). 4 states: Normal, Hover (bg rgba(28,28,28,0.06)), Active (bg rgba(0,99,255,0.1)), Active+Hover.

MenuGroup.description: Collapsible section: MenuHeader + vertical list of MenuItems. When collapsed, items have h-0 + overflow-clip (hidden). When expanded, items visible with gap-px between them.

MenuItem.description: Regular menu item with optional dot indicator (colored circle or trash bin icon) and optional badge count. 4 states: Normal, Hover (bg rgba(28,28,28,0.06)), Active (bg rgba(0,99,255,0.1)), Active+Hover. On hover when badge exists, badge is replaced by ⋮ More icon.

MenuItemOverview.description: Overview/root-level bold menu item for the 'overview' type. Optional 20px icon on left, optional chevron-right (24px) on right for drill-in to sub-pages. 4 states: Normal, Hover (bg rgba(28,28,28,0.06)), Active (bg rgba(0,99,255,0.1)), Active+Hover.

Header.description: Top header area with border-bottom. Two types: 'inbox' (bold title + badge, no chevron) or 'subpage' (chevron-left + 'Go to overview' back navigation).

Dot.description: Left-side indicator in MenuItem. Two types: 'dot' (8px colored circle) or 'bin' (20px trash can icon). Dot colors: green=#028465, yellow=#E89C2E, red=#CE3F42, blue=#4573D2.

NewCategory.description: '+ New category' placeholder button. 3 states: Normal (text only, color #9DA3AE), Hover (bg #FAFAFA + border #DDD), Focus (bg #FAFAFA + border #4573D2 + shadow 0 0 0 2px rgba(0,99,255,0.25)).

Panel.description: Bottom panel area with border-top. Contains action button(s) and text links. In Inbox type: 'Add documents' button (default appearance) + 'Send documents via mobile app' text + email link in blue #4573D2.

Chevron.description: Directional arrow icon with 4 variants: collapsed+solid (right-pointing filled triangle), expanded+solid (down-pointing filled triangle), collapsed+outline (right chevron stroke), expanded+outline (left chevron stroke). Solid used in MenuHeader, outline used in Header subpage back and MenuItemOverview drill-in.

styling.menuItem: h-[32px], w-[232px], pl-[20px], font-normal 14px/20px, hover bg rgba(28,28,28,0.06), active bg rgba(0,99,255,0.1)
styling.menuItemOverview: h-[32px], w-[232px], pl-[8px], font-bold 14px/20px, optional 20px icon + 24px chevron-right
styling.newCategory: text-[#9DA3AE], hover: bg #FAFAFA + border #DDD, focus: border #4573D2 + shadow

iconMapping.overviewDrillIn: chevron-right (24px, shown on right of overview items with sub-pages)
iconMapping.subpageBack: chevron-left (20px, in subpage header for 'Go to overview')
iconMapping.binItem: delete (16px, trash icon for Bin menu item in inbox type)

SideNavigation.usage_normal: <SideNavigation type="normal" groups={[{ id: 'g1', label: 'Sales', items: [{ id: 'i1', label: 'Invoices' }] }]} />
SideNavigation.usage_overview: <SideNavigation type="overview" items={[{ id: 'sales', label: 'Sales', chevron: true }]} bottomItems={[{ id: 'inbox', label: 'Inbox', icon: <InboxIcon /> }]} />

TopNavigation.description: Dark top navigation bar with logo, primary text menu items, secondary round icon buttons (some colored), divider, and agreement selector with avatar. Sub-components: VismaLogo (5 detail levels: Icon+Visma+e-con, Icon+e-con, e-con, Menu hamburger, Splash symbol), PrimaryMenuItem (white text, optional chevron-down for submenus, hover bg rgba(255,255,255,0.08)), SecondaryMenuItem (round 32px icon button, colored backgrounds: None/Orange=#E89C2E/Green=#08AE87/Blue=#4573D2), CurrentAgreement (avatar 36px + company name + agreement number + optional admin Badge, compact mode = avatar only), Avatar (36px round, placeholder image or vector).

logoText.description: Logo. ALWAYS use this exact img tag: — 28×28px on the dark #29283E bar.

primaryItems.description: Array of { id, label, active?, hasSubmenu? }

secondaryItems.description: Array of { id, icon, label, color? } — icon is name like 'search', 'inbox', 'bell', 'chat', 'settings'

AlertDialog.description: Modal alert dialog with 5 variants. Badge icon is INLINE with title on same row (flex gap-[8px]). Only error/warning/info have badges; confirmation and destructive have NO badge.

variant.description: error=red badge + single OK button (default grey), warning=yellow badge + Cancel/Continue, info=blue badge + Cancel/Continue, confirmation=no badge + Cancel/Continue, destructive=no badge + Cancel/Delete (red) + safety step

content.description: Optional content slot between description and footer

confirmLabel.description: Defaults per variant: error='OK', destructive='Delete', others='Continue'

safetyText.description: For destructive: user must type this text to enable Delete button. Shows prompt 'To confirm, please enter the name of the category:' + input field

styling.badgeRow: flex items-center gap-[8px] — badge INLINE with title, NOT above
styling.badge: w-[20px] h-[20px] rounded-full with white icon inside — error=#CE3F42 (X cross), warning=#FFBD3B (exclamation), info=#4573D2 (letter i). Confirmation and destructive have NO badge.
styling.title: text-[24px] leading-[32px] font-normal text-[#1C1C1C] (NOT bold)

buttons.default: bg-[#EBEBEB] text-[#1C1C1C] px-[12px] py-[6px] rounded-[4px] text-[14px] leading-[20px] font-normal
buttons.primary: bg-[#4573D2] text-white px-[12px] py-[6px] rounded-[4px] text-[14px] leading-[20px] font-normal
buttons.danger: bg-[#CE3F42] text-white px-[12px] py-[6px] rounded-[4px] text-[14px] leading-[20px] font-normal

styling.safetyInput: h-[32px] border-[#DDD] rounded-[4px] px-[8px] py-[6px] placeholder:text-[#9DA3AE]

AlertDialog.usage: <AlertDialog variant="error" title="Delete failed" description="Could not delete the invoice." onConfirm={fn} onCancel={fn} />

Accordion.description: Collapsible content section with chevron toggle. Supports single or multiple open items.

items.description: Array of { id, title, content } objects

defaultOpen.description: Array of item ids to open by default

ModalDialog.description: Large modal dialog with 4 size variants. Single p-[24px] container (NO inner borders between header/body/footer). Close icon floats top-right. Optional grey bottom section.

extraContent.description: Optional grey bottom section bg-[#F6F6F6] p-[24px] with rounded-bl-[4px] rounded-br-[4px]

styling.layout: Single p-[24px] container, NO inner borders between header/body/footer
styling.closeIcon: Floating top-right, p-[6px], 20px x icon, absolute positioned
styling.title: text-[24px] leading-[32px] font-normal text-[#1C1C1C] pb-[24px] (NOT bold)
styling.footer: flex justify-end gap-[8px] pt-[24px], default + primary buttons
styling.extraContent: bg-[#F6F6F6] p-[24px] rounded-bl-[4px] rounded-br-[4px], outside the main padded container

buttons.cancel: bg-[#EBEBEB] text-[#1C1C1C] px-[12px] py-[6px] rounded-[4px] text-[14px] leading-[20px] font-normal
buttons.confirm: bg-[#4573D2] text-white px-[12px] py-[6px] rounded-[4px] text-[14px] leading-[20px] font-normal

ModalDialog.usage: <ModalDialog size="s" title="Edit Invoice" onConfirm={fn} onClose={fn}>Body content</ModalDialog>

CardList.description: Container for card-style list items. Supports separated (gap between cards) and grouped (joined borders, shared rounded corners) layouts.

variant.description: separated = gap-[8px] between items with individual rounded-[10px]; grouped = joined with shared borders, first/last rounded-[8px]

CardListItem.description: Rich card-style list item with 6 interaction types: link-internal (chevron-right), link-external (open-in-new icon), button (no trailing icon), switch (toggle), checkbox (tick), collapsible (expandable content).

type.description: Determines trailing element and interaction behavior

status.description: Status text after title — use <Status> component

expandContent.description: Content shown when collapsible is expanded

styling.container: bg-white border border-[#DDDDDD], min-h-[64px], p-[12px], gap-[12px]
styling.title: 14px/20px bold #1C1C1C
styling.switch: 36×20 pill — off=#ACACAC, on=#4573D2, white 16px circle thumb
styling.checkbox: 20×20 rounded-[4px] — unchecked border-[#595959], checked bg-[#4573D2] with white tick

CardListItem.usage: <CardListItem type="link-internal" title="Account" description="Manage account" icon={<ListIcon color="blue" />} />

ListIcon.description: Colored icon container for use inside CardListItem. 40×40px square with rounded corners and colored background from the tag palette.

color.description: Background color: grey=rgba(28,28,28,0.08), blue=#DEEBFF, green=#CDF0E7, yellow=#FFF1C3, red=#FFDAD2, pink=#FFE3F7, purple=#EEE5FF, brown=#EEE0DA, orange=#FFE3BB

icon.description: 24×24 icon element; defaults to book placeholder

Status.description: Inline colored text label used inside CardListItem to show status after the title. Bold 14px text in 5 semantic colors.

DashboardCard.description: Dashboard card containing a bar chart visualization with title, value, trend indicator, and optional info box. Used on the main dashboard to display KPIs with chart context.

showInfoBox.description: When true, shows a tooltip-like info box overlay on the chart

DashboardHoverCard.description: Expanded dashboard card shown on hover with detailed chart, more menu, and additional info. 5 states: normal, more-menu, legends, hover, hover+infobox.

variants.hover-infobox: header + chart with CardInfoBox tooltip on data point

DashboardMoreMenuLegends.description: Dropdown menu with color-coded legend items and checkboxes for toggling chart series visibility.

items.description: Array of { label, color, checked } legend items

CardInfoBox.description: Small tooltip-like overlay box that appears on dashboard charts showing a specific data point value.

BarSegment.description: Individual bar chart segment. 16 variants covering single/end/middle/beginning positions in both solid and hatched styles, each in two widths (16px and 24px).

position.description: Position in a stacked bar — affects border-radius

hatched.description: When true, shows diagonal stripe hatching pattern overlay

color.description: Bar fill color hex value from chart palette

Bar.description: Complete vertical bar composed of stacked BarSegments. Supports single-color and multi-color stacked configurations. 14 variants shown in Figma.

segments.description: Array of { color, height, hatched? } for each segment in the stack

ChartLegend.description: Color-coded legend item for charts. Square color swatch + text label. 10 variants covering all chart colors including hatched variants.

color.description: Color hex value for the legend swatch

hatched.description: Shows hatching pattern on the color swatch

swatch.hatched: overlay pattern same as BarSegment when hatched=true

ChartHeader.description: Header row for dashboard chart cards with title, value, trend arrow, and optional kebab menu button.

AxisLabels.description: Chart axis labels component. 3 variants: Y-axis (vertical values like 100K, 200K), X-axis (horizontal month/category labels), and combined.

LegendBar.description: Horizontal row of ChartLegend items displayed below a chart. Used as the standard legend placement for bar and line charts.

DonutChart.description: SVG donut/ring chart with center label showing total value. Uses stroke-dasharray for segment rendering. Supports multiple color segments.

segments.description: Array of { value, color } for each donut segment

DonutChartLegend.description: Legend list for donut charts with color swatch, label, value, and optional percentage. 2 states: collapsed and expanded.

items.description: Array of { color, label, value, percentage } items

CheckboxColorGrid.description: Grid of color-coded checkboxes used in the more menu for toggling chart series. 9 colors x 5 columns layout.

items.description: Array of { color, label, checked } items

CheckboxWithWhiteTick.description: Colored checkbox with white checkmark tick when checked. 9 color variants matching the chart color palette.

BarChartVerticalSingle.description: Vertical bar chart with single-color bars. Y-axis with value labels, X-axis with category labels, and bottom legend.

data.description: Array of { label, value } data points

BarChartVerticalStacked.description: Vertical bar chart with stacked multi-color segments per bar. Each bar shows multiple data series stacked on top of each other.

data.description: Array of { label, segments: [{value, color}] } data points

legend.description: Array of { color, label } for the legend

BarChartVerticalGroup.description: Vertical bar chart with grouped (side-by-side) bars per category. Each category shows multiple bars next to each other.

data.description: Array of { label, values: [{value, color}] } data points

legend.description: Array of { color, label } for the legend

styling.radius: 2px on top of each individual bar

BarChartVerticalMultiColor.description: Vertical bar chart where each bar has a different color. Used to compare distinct categories rather than series.

data.description: Array of { label, value, color } data points, each bar a different color

BarChartVerticalDoubleHatching.description: Vertical bar chart with paired bars per category — solid + hatched variants. Used to show actual vs. projected or budget vs. actual comparisons.

data.description: Array of { label, solid: {value, color}, hatched: {value, color} } paired data

legend.description: 4-item legend: solid color A, solid color B, hatched color A, hatched color B

hatching.applied: to second bar in each pair

LineChartSingle.description: Line chart with a single data series. SVG polyline rendering with optional area fill below the line.

data.description: Array of { label, value } data points

LineChartMultiple.description: Line chart with multiple data series. Each series is a different color polyline. Supports up to 4+ series with legend.

series.description: Array of { color, label, data: [{label, value}] } series

AreaChartSingle.description: Area chart with a single series. SVG path with semi-transparent fill below the line.

data.description: Array of { label, value } data points

AreaChartTwoSeries.description: Area chart with two data series, each with its own fill color. Series may overlap.

series.description: Array of 2 series: { color, label, data: [{label, value}] }

styling.areaFillOpacity: 0.2 (each series uses its color at 20% opacity)
styling.overlap: series render with mix-blend-mode: multiply so overlapping areas darken naturally

AreaChartPositiveNegative.description: Area chart showing values above and below zero. Positive area filled in green, negative area filled in red. Zero line drawn as reference.

data.description: Array of { label, value } — positive values show green fill, negative show red fill

DonutChartWithBottomLegend.description: Composed donut chart visualization with the legend placed below the chart. Includes center total label.

segments.description: Donut segments with { value, color, label }

DonutChartWithRightLegends.description: Composed donut chart visualization with detailed legends placed to the right of the chart. Legends show label, value, and percentage.

segments.description: Donut segments with { value, color, label, percentage }

styling.legendList: uses DonutChartLegend (label + value + % per row, gap 8px)

DonutChartWithRightLegends.usage: <DonutChartWithRightLegends segments={[{value: 40, color: '#75A0F5', label: 'Category A', percentage: '40%'}]} total="234.351" />

DashboardTable.description: Simple data table used in dashboard cards. Columns: Type (with color indicator), Date, Amount. Shows transaction/entry rows.

rows.description: Array of { type, typeColor, date, amount } row data

DashboardTable.usage: <DashboardTable columns={['Type', 'Date', 'Amount']} rows={[{type: 'Journal entry', typeColor: '#75A0F5', date: '21.04.22', amount: '12.400'}]} />

EmptyState.description: Empty state placeholder shown when a dashboard card has no data. Contains an illustration placeholder area and descriptive message.

message.default: You don't have any registrations yet.

EmptyState.usage: <EmptyState message="You don't have any registrations yet." />

HomepageCard.description: Chat/support card for the homepage. Contains message text, avatar placeholder, and action button.
HomepageCard.usage: <HomepageCard message="Chat with us all weekdays" buttonLabel="Start chat" />

MenuItems.description: Individual menu item for use inside Menu. Supports list items, headers, and dividers. List items can have optional icons (left or right) and keyboard shortcuts.

type.description: Item type: list-item for actionable row, header for section label, divider for separator line

shortcut.description: Optional keyboard shortcut text displayed on the right (e.g. '⌘,')

MenuContent.description: Container that holds multiple MenuItems stacked vertically. Auto-sizes width to fit its content.

children.description: MenuItems to display inside the content area

styling.autoSize: width grows to fit widest item

Menu.description: Floating menu container with elevation shadow and rounded corners. Contains MenuContent with MenuItems. Two width modes: narrow (auto-width) and wide (>340px minimum).

wide.description: If true, menu has a minimum width of 340px

Icon.description: Icon component from the TACO icon library. All icons are 24×24px with fill color #1C1C1C. Used throughout the navigation, toolbar, and action elements.

name.description: Icon name from the TACO icon set

Badge.description: Small rounded-full pill for status indication or numeric counts. Bolder than Tag with fully rounded shape. Available in 5 variant styles: default (strong fill), subtle (light fill), outline (deprecated, white bg with colored border), with status dot (6px dot before label), and small (compact 10px text).

variant.description: strong = filled background, subtle = light tinted background, outline = white bg with colored border (deprecated), dot = strong fill with 6x6px status dot before label, small = compact size with 10px text

size.description: default = text-xs py-[2px] px-[8px], small = text-[10px] py-[1px] px-[6px]

statusDot.bg: contrast color on the badge (e.g., white on strong fill)

BadgeDot.description: Small colored dot indicator for status display. 8px diameter circle.

BadgeIcon.description: Small circular icon badge for status indicators (info, success, warning, error). Available in default (filled) and subtle (outlined) variants at 20px and 16px sizes.

type.description: Status type determining icon and color

variant.description: default = filled circle, subtle = outlined circle

LinkText.description: Styled text link with underline. Available in 3 sizes with regular and bold weights.

Spinner.description: Loading spinner indicator. Available in 4 sizes, optionally with a text label below.

label.description: Optional text label shown below the spinner (only with size 40)

styling.color: #4573D2 (primary) — inherits from currentColor when placed on button

SkeletonLoader.description: Placeholder shimmer animation for loading states. Available as text block, card, or table row placeholders.

styling.animation: shimmer 1.5s ease-in-out infinite (moving left to right)

Toast.description: Notification toast for transient feedback messages. White background with colored border. Available in compact (auto-width) and wide (384px) variants. Supports 5 types: success, information, error, warning, and loading.

type.description: Determines icon badge and border color

variant.description: compact = auto-width inline, wide = 384px fixed width

styling.container: flex items-start gap-[8px] bg-white rounded-[4px] overflow-clip pl-[9px] pr-[6px] py-[11px] border

Alert.description: Inline alert message for contextual feedback. Full-width box with icon badge, bold title, body text, and optional close button. Available in 6 types: info, success, warning, error, default, and experiment.

type.description: Alert type determining color scheme and icon

children.description: Body text content below the title

onClose.description: If provided, shows a close (x) button

Alert.usage: <Alert type="info" title="Your trial ends in 14 days" />

Banner.description: Full-width notification bar with icon badge, text message, and close button. White background with elevation shadow. Available in 5 types: information, success, help, error, and warning.

type.description: Determines the icon badge color and icon

Callout.description: Blue informational callout tooltip with an arrow pointer. Used for onboarding hints and feature discovery. Available in compact (title only) and description (title + body) variants, with 8 arrow placement directions.

variant.description: compact = title only (auto-width), description = title + body text (224px wide)

arrowPosition.description: Direction the arrow points from the callout

arrow.offset: -6px from the edge the arrow points from

Tour.description: Step-by-step onboarding guide tooltip. Similar to Callout but with navigation controls (Back/Next) and step counter.

arrowPosition.description: Direction the arrow points from the tour tooltip

showBack.description: Show Back button (false for first step)

styling.title: text-[16px] leading-[24px] font-bold text-[#1C1C1C] pb-[4px] pr-[28px]

nextButton.style: px-[12px] py-[6px] rounded-[4px] text-[14px] leading-[20px] font-normal

styling.closeButton: absolute top-0 right-0 p-[6px] bg-transparent text-[#595959] hover:bg-[rgba(0,0,0,0.08)] rounded-[4px]
styling.arrow: 10px CSS triangle using border trick, colored white

Tour.usage: <Tour step={1} totalSteps={4} title="Welcome" arrowPosition="bottom">Let's get started</Tour>

Popover.description: Generic floating white container with an arrow pointer and elevation shadow. Used as a base for menus, tooltips, and other floating UI. Supports 4 placement directions.

position.description: Position relative to the trigger element

styling.arrow: 10px CSS triangle using border trick, colored white

TableRow.description: Enhanced table row component with selection (checkbox), expansion (chevron), and inline status badges. Used within Table3 for interactive row behavior.

expandable.description: Adds chevron for row expansion with nested content

selected.description: Whether the row is currently selected

expanded.description: Whether the row is currently expanded

row.border: none (uses inset shadow for bottom border)

illustrations.$description: TACO illustration library. Use these in prototypes for empty states, onboarding, feature pages, and contextual visuals. Reference by filename from showcase/illustrations/. ALWAYS check this library before creating custom illustrations.

book.usage: Knowledge base, documentation, learning, e-copedia, help sections

charts and documents in a box.file: charts and documents in a box.svg
charts and documents in a box.description: Charts and documents in a box
charts and documents in a box.usage: Reports, data collection, bundled documents, archive

clock, list.usage: Time tracking, scheduling, task lists, deadlines, reminders

document with coffee.usage: Casual document review, relaxed onboarding, getting started

document with notification.usage: New documents, unread notifications, action required on documents

documents with chain link.description: Documents connected with a chain link
documents with chain link.usage: Linked documents, integrations, connected records, attachments

farvel fairwell user panel.usage: Account deletion, offboarding, goodbye screens, subscription cancellation

Firmakort_Man-in-bakery-pays-scans-recei.description: Man in bakery pays and scans receipt with company card
Firmakort_Man-in-bakery-pays-scans-recei.usage: Expense management, company card, receipt scanning, Firmakort feature

Firmakort_Man-pays-scans-receipt.description: Man pays and scans receipt with company card
Firmakort_Man-pays-scans-receipt.usage: Expense management, company card payments, receipt scanning, Firmakort

Hand signing document.usage: Contracts, agreements, e-signature, approval, signing flows

happy support people.usage: Customer support, help center, contact us, support team

Invoice draft.usage: Draft invoices, empty invoice list, creating new invoices

invoice invoiced.usage: Completed invoices, invoiced state, invoice confirmation

live course presentation.usage: Webinars, courses, training, live events, presentations

Man carrying box of documents in the rai.file: Man carrying box of documents in the rain.svg
Man carrying box of documents in the rai.description: Man carrying box of documents in the rain
Man carrying box of documents in the rai.usage: Document migration, difficult transitions, moving data, pain points

Man carrying box with documents 1.description: Man carrying a box with documents
Man carrying box with documents 1.usage: Document management, moving files, migration, archiving

Man delivering destroyed box of document.file: Man delivering destroyed box of documents to bookkeeper.svg
Man delivering destroyed box of document.description: Man delivering destroyed box of documents to bookkeeper
Man delivering destroyed box of document.usage: Messy bookkeeping, disorganized documents, need for better tools

Man fighting with dog over box of docume.file: Man fighting with dog over box of documnets.svg
Man fighting with dog over box of docume.description: Man fighting with dog over box of documents
Man fighting with dog over box of docume.usage: Humorous error states, document chaos, lighthearted empty states

Man loosing flying documents from drivin.file: Man loosing flying documents from driving car.svg
Man loosing flying documents from drivin.description: Man losing flying documents from a driving car
Man loosing flying documents from drivin.usage: Lost documents, data loss warning, backup reminders

Man pointing at statistics.usage: Reports, analytics, dashboards, data insights, KPIs

man pointing at laptop with corona-1.file: man pointing at laptop with corona-1.svg
man pointing at laptop with corona-1.description: Man pointing at laptop with corona icon

man pointing to a laptop.usage: Feature introduction, product demos, getting started, onboarding

man shows paper-3.usage: Document preview, presenting results, showing reports

man with a box in a warehouse.file: man with a box in a warehause.svg
man with a box in a warehouse.description: Man with a box in a warehouse

money-paperplane.usage: Payments, sending money, transfers, fast payments

Movers moving boxes.usage: Migration, moving data, switching systems, onboarding from another tool

Movers, moving boxes into car.description: Movers loading boxes into a car
Movers, moving boxes into car.usage: Data export, migration, moving to a new system

Movers, moving boxes into car-inbox.description: Movers loading boxes into car (inbox variant)
Movers, moving boxes into car-inbox.usage: Inbox migration, importing documents, bulk import

order archive.usage: Archived orders, order history, completed orders

order draft.usage: Draft orders, empty order list, creating new orders

paper plane with dollar sign.description: Paper plane with a dollar sign
paper plane with dollar sign.usage: Sending payments, money transfers, invoicing, billing

paper plane with toggle.description: Paper plane with a toggle switch
paper plane with toggle.usage: Automated sending, auto-pay settings, scheduled deliveries

People raising their hands.description: People raising their hands in celebration
People raising their hands.usage: Success states, celebrations, team achievements, onboarding complete

People scanning a barcode on a box.file: People scanning a barcode on a box.svg
People scanning a barcode on a box.description: People scanning a barcode on a box
People scanning a barcode on a box.usage: Inventory scanning, product tracking, warehouse management

People talking by coffeemachine in offic.file: People talking by coffeemachine in office.svg
People talking by coffeemachine in offic.description: People talking by coffee machine in office
People talking by coffeemachine in offic.usage: Team collaboration, office culture, casual meetings, community

Quote draft.usage: Draft quotes, empty quote list, creating new quotes

Robot writing on laptop.usage: AI features, automation, smart tools, auto-generated content

sprint of wow, man, woman, laptop, light.file: sprint of wow, man, woman, laptop, lightbulb, working.svg
sprint of wow, man, woman, laptop, light.description: Man and woman working on laptop with lightbulb moment
sprint of wow, man, woman, laptop, light.usage: Innovation, brainstorming, new ideas, feature discovery, aha moments

support man light monitor.description: Support person at a monitor with light
support man light monitor.usage: Customer support, help desk, technical assistance, guided help

velkommen welcome user panel.usage: Welcome screens, onboarding, first-time user experience, new account

woman apps market addons extensions.usage: App marketplace, extensions, integrations, add-ons, plugin store

woman working on a laptop.usage: General productivity, working, getting things done, feature pages

icons.source: showcase/icons.html — contains full SVG markup for all icons in the systemIconSVGs JavaScript object
icons.note: To get the full SVG path data for any icon, look it up in showcase/icons.html. Navigation icons have inline SVG in the HTML markup. System icons have their SVG paths in the systemIconSVGs JavaScript object near the bottom of the file.

navigationPrimary.description: Primary and secondary navigation icons used in TopNavigation, SideNavigation, and directional/utility contexts

system.description: System icons for actions, status, and UI elements
